productDisplayName: Nike Fragrances Men Green Storm Perfume 150 ml
description: A part of the nike fragrances 150 Beyond Elements line, the nike fragrances Green Storm for men comes in a colour happy flask, styled to look like a sipper, so delectable that your olfactory senses will never get enough of this. Spicy and woodsy, this aroma's top notes are peak wormwood, pepper and citrus, with base notes of lavender, cedar and sandal wood. Wear this with semi-formal ensembles.Caution: Flammable, Keep away from sources of ignition, Keep away from children. Do not use near fire, flame or heat, Avoid spraying near the eyes
